Quick Links — Visit the dashboards for more information

COMMERCIAL DASHBOARD
MERCHANT SEARCH DASHBOARD

Legend — Metric and Abbreviation Definitions

TW — This Week Revenue for the current reporting week ending {{TW_DATE}}
LW — Last Week Revenue for the prior reporting week ending {{LW_DATE}}
WoW — Week-on-Week Change in revenue from LW to TW, shown in both RM and %
YTD — Year to Date Cumulative revenue from 1 January through the report week-ending date
MTD — Month to Date Cumulative revenue from the 1st of the report month through the report week-ending date
Contribution % This merchant's TW revenue as a percentage of total commercial TW revenue (standalone per-merchant figure)
Top 5 Cumulative % Sum of Contribution % for the top 5 merchants in the Concentration Risk table; the primary concentration risk signal (<50% OK, ≥50% Caution, ≥70% High Risk)
DDNQR Migration % DDNQR total TPV as a percentage of total commercial TPV for the same period; tracks the share of payment volume migrated to Dynamic Duitnow QR
Noise Filter Minimum weekly revenue threshold applied per L3 category to exclude immaterial merchants from bucket tables (lower of 1% of L3 weekly revenue or bottom quartile merchant revenue within that L3)
DDNQR Merchants using Dynamic Duitnow QR (MID = EP142731); shown in a dedicated table per L3 category and in the global Top 10
Rising Momentum Merchants with 3 or more consecutive weeks of WoW revenue growth (revenue must increase each week vs the prior week)
Declining Momentum Merchants with 3 or more consecutive weeks of WoW revenue decline (revenue must decrease each week vs the prior week)
Reactivated Merchants with TW revenue > 0 and LW revenue = 0 exactly (returned to activity after one or more absent weeks)
New Entrants Merchants with no revenue recorded in any prior week across the full combined dataset before TW (first-ever appearance)

Weekly Performance Snapshot — Commercial Division

 

This report is for internal use only. Do not forward, share, or distribute outside the organisation.
